# MySQL Performance Submodule (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/mysql/performance`.

## Docs

- [Performance Overview](../performance.mdx): Root-level topic overview for slow SQL triage, execution plans, and index governance.
- [Tuning Playbook](./tuning-playbook.mdx): SQL optimization workflow, index strategy, and validation loop.
- [Performance Sidebar Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for the performance submodule.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this performance directory.
